calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) FDI-85-837850 WITH CASE CPF-77-721175
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: (416) 04/01/2010
(Tillinghast) Clerk: Kevin M. Lee; Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian, CSR #12355. General advisement given re: Margaret Tillinghast as Judge Pro Tempore. Mother not present; Father not present; CSA = Spraggins. Matter is on calendar for motion to consolidate actions. All parties present stipulate to Margaret Tillinghast as judge pro tempore. Motion is granted. Court hereby consolidates #FDI-85-837850 into/under #CPF-77-721175 with the lead case being #CPF-77-721175, and all subsequent filings to be under the lead case. The Findings and Orders of the Court were signed and filed in court this day, and are incorporated herein by reference.
